chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-440 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.5297/2022 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on M.A No.2162/2022 4. For hearing of main case 21.04.2022 Mr. Bashir Ahmed Almani, advocate for petitioner *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Petitioner has filed this petition against the respondents for an order that the protection be given to the petitioner and his co-villagers so that they may reside in their village peacefully and cultivate their lands without hindrance of any one. We are afraid that the litigation is pending before Additional Deputy Commissioner Shaheed Benazirabad in shape of appeal since 2020, therefore, petitioner, if aggrieved of any action of respondents, may move appropriate application in this regard and may pursue his remedy as available and pending before Additional Deputy Commissioner. Petition being misconceived is dismissed alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
